active_agent_handoff.task_status: All 7 frontend phases complete. Backend tasks 2-5 complete: added /contact endpoint, fixed Docker port alignment (Caddy/backend/Dockerfile now all 9000), deleted dead surgical_extractor.py (1013 lines), added OLLAMA_BASE_URL to config/imports, wrote backend tests + frontend vitest test. Zero TS errors.

database.latest_changes_summary: Added event-loop bridge for sync-to-async DB persistence from worker threads. TaskStore now writes through to PostgreSQL on every state transition (create, update, promote, complete, fail, remove). Graceful fallback to memory-only when DB unavailable.

youtube.type: YouTubeSurgicalFunnel (6 stages: Scout, Signal, Funnel, Strike, CV, Render)
youtube.note: Dead surgical_extractor.py (1013 lines, 39KB) deleted — was never imported or called. Active pipeline lives entirely in youtube_router.py.

local.type: 6-stage async pipeline (load, audio analysis, transcription, clip selection, face detection, render)
local.note: Frontend blocks file upload — only accessible via API directly

vision_clip_selector.note: Added OLLAMA_BASE_URL to utils/config.py with env var default (http://localhost:11434). Imported in vision_clip_selector.py.

task_management.store: In-memory TaskStore with PostgreSQL persistence bridge

backend.latest_changes_summary: Added POST /contact endpoint (accepts email, subject, message, logs to console). Fixed Docker port alignment — Dockerfile now EXPOSE 9000 / CMD --port 9000, Caddyfile proxies to backend:9000. Deleted dead surgical_extractor.py (1013 lines, 39KB, never imported). Added OLLAMA_BASE_URL to utils/config.py and imported in vision_clip_selector.py. Wrote tests: test_health.py, test_contact.py, test_task_store.py (10 test cases).

frontend.latest_changes_summary: Phase 1-7 complete. Contact form wired to POST /contact. Plans page buttons functional. InputDropzone shows file-upload-unavailable guidance. prefers-reduced-motion CSS, 404 page, skip-to-content, aria-current nav, cookie consent banner all in place. Zero TS errors.
